descNew: Create a Stellar wallet secured with your fingerprint or Face ID. You don't need to remember any password.
descReconnect: Authenticate with your fingerprint or Face ID to continue.
descConfiguring: Creating your vault and permissions. Sign each step with your fingerprint or Face ID.
descCardConfiguring: Sign with your passkey to complete setup.
descCardReconnect: Confirm your wallet with passkey to access the dashboard.
descCardNew: Your wallet will be linked to this email and protected with passkey.
signPrompt: Sign with your fingerprint or Face ID when the dialog appears.
